title.zh: 变压器、GOES 与铜：AI 电力硬件瓶颈的价格传导
title.en: Transformers, GOES, and Copper: Price Pass-Through in AI Power Hardware

thesis.zh: AI 电力交易的核心不只是发电量，而是高压变压器、取向硅钢、铜铝与开关设备的交付约束；这些约束决定设备商利润率、客户交期与终端算力释放速度。
thesis.en: The AI power trade is not only about generation; it is constrained by high-voltage transformers, grain-oriented electrical steel, copper, aluminum, and switchgear, which determine equipment margins, customer delivery timing, and compute release.

zh: 设备交期是否比电源装机更能解释 AI 算力延期？
原材料涨价能否通过设备商议价传导给数据中心客户？
中国电力设备出海是否会被贸易壁垒削弱？
en: Do equipment lead times explain AI compute delays better than generation capacity?
Can equipment vendors pass raw-material inflation through to data-center customers?
Will trade barriers dilute the overseas opportunity for Chinese power-equipment suppliers?

evidence.title_zh: 关键电力设备供应链瓶颈：变压器与开关设备交付周期调研
evidence.title_en: 关键电力设备供应链瓶颈：变压器与开关设备交付周期调研
evidence.summary_zh: 结论：大型电力变压器（LPT，≥100 MVA）与中压开关设备的交付周期在 2027 年前结构性拉长，2028 年底前难以正常化， 验证了瓶颈框架但收紧了其内涵 ——2026–2027 年 AI 集群通电的真正硬约束并非变压器本体产能，而是 (i) 取向硅钢（GOES）的供应、(ii) 熟练绕线/调试工程师的劳动力缺口。 多头逻辑的尾部风险 ——2027 年 GOES 价格冲击或美国输配电劳工罢工事件会进一步右移交付期；反向地，Sec…
evidence.summary_en: 结论：大型电力变压器（LPT，≥100 MVA）与中压开关设备的交付周期在 2027 年前结构性拉长，2028 年底前难以正常化， 验证了瓶颈框架但收紧了其内涵 ——2026–2027 年 AI 集群通电的真正硬约束并非变压器本体产能，而是 (i) 取向硅钢（GOES）的供应、(ii) 熟练绕线/调试工程师的劳动力缺口。 多头逻辑的尾部风险 ——2027 年 GOES 价格冲击或美国输配电劳工罢工事件会进一步右移交付期；反向地，Sec…
evidence.implication_zh: 说明 AI 基础设施的约束首先体现在电力、电网和设备交付，而不是只体现在芯片供给。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that the first binding constraint is power, grid access, and equipment delivery, not only chip supply.

evidence.title_zh: 产业链调研：电力设备产业链：变压器及配电网核心组件的产能与交期评估
evidence.title_en: Transformer and distribution-grid component capacity and lead-time survey
evidence.summary_zh: 产业链调研：电力设备产业链：变压器及配电网核心组件的产能与交期评估。 接续能源行业分析师对“配电网执行节奏是公用事业系统瓶颈”的判断，截至2026-05-17，我们深入电力设备产业链调研发现： 变压器产能瓶颈与高磁感取向硅钢（HiB）供应紧缺是2026-2027年1.2万亿元配网投资兑现的核心制约。 当前，110kV及以上高压变压器产能已出现结构性透支，交期大幅拉长，具备产能扩张和供应链管理能力的电力设备龙头（如 600550.SH、…
evidence.summary_en: The supply-chain survey identifies transformer capacity and high-grade electrical steel as the core delivery constraints for the 2026-2027 distribution-grid investment cycle.
evidence.implication_zh: 说明 AI 基础设施的约束首先体现在电力、电网和设备交付，而不是只体现在芯片供给。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that the first binding constraint is power, grid access, and equipment delivery, not only chip supply.

evidence.title_zh: 研究记录 07 研究报告：铜、铝、GOES及变压器油等关键原材料的供应缺口与价格传导风险，2026-05-20
evidence.title_en: 研究记录 07 研究报告：铜、铝、GOES及变压器油等关键原材料的供应缺口与价格传导风险，2026-05-20
evidence.summary_zh: 研究记录 07 研究报告：铜、铝、GOES及变压器油等关键原材料的供应缺口与价格传导风险，2026-05-20。 “原材料指数联动”条款： 一线电力设备巨头在积压的多年期在手订单中，普遍写入了铜、钢、铝价格指数联动协议（Price Escalation Clauses）。 价格替代平衡点： 2026 年初以来，铜铝价格比（Copper-to-Aluminum Price Ratio）已冲破 4.2，远超传统工业大规模铜铝替代的 3.5…
evidence.summary_en: 研究记录 07 研究报告：铜、铝、GOES及变压器油等关键原材料的供应缺口与价格传导风险，2026-05-20。 “原材料指数联动”条款： 一线电力设备巨头在积压的多年期在手订单中，普遍写入了铜、钢、铝价格指数联动协议（Price Escalation Clauses）。 价格替代平衡点： 2026 年初以来，铜铝价格比（Copper-to-Aluminum Price Ratio）已冲破 4.2，远超传统工业大规模铜铝替代的 3.5…
evidence.implication_zh: 说明 AI 基础设施的约束首先体现在电力、电网和设备交付，而不是只体现在芯片供给。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that the first binding constraint is power, grid access, and equipment delivery, not only chip supply.

evidence.title_zh: 研究报告：2026-05-17 - 变压器供应瓶颈与GOES利润捕获
evidence.title_en: 研究报告：2026-05-17 - 变压器供应瓶颈与GOES利润捕获
evidence.summary_zh: 因此更优交易表达应是有选择地超配高压变压器、变电站、开关设备、Grid Integration产能以及合格GOES/铁芯钢供应商；不应把受监管公用事业简单当作最纯AI电力beta，因为其准许收益率、融资久期和资产负债表约束仍会稀释主题收益。 变压器OEM在近端足以用定价权抵消GOES、铜、物流和关税等成本上行。 pv magazine，美国变压器市场约束，2026年5月12日：https://www.pv-magazine.com/2…

evidence.title_zh: 研究记录 07 · 硅钢（GOES）产能缺口对变压器毛利的压力测试
evidence.title_en: 研究记录 07 · 硅钢（GOES）产能缺口对变压器毛利的压力测试
evidence.summary_zh: 变压器订单延期：如果上游电力信用紧缩（研究记录）导致 IPP / 数据中心订单延期 6 个月以上，GOES 缺口会自然消化 1/3–1/2，但这也意味着研究记录 的 spread 行情节奏延后。 核心判断：普通 GOES 几乎平衡，但 高磁感 / 超薄规格存在 280–560 kt 的硬缺口 ——这与研究记录 提出的"变压器交付周期 130–160 周"在时间维度上完全吻合，因为变压器 OEM 拿不到 0.18–0.20 mm 卷板…

evidence.title_zh: AI电力硬件瓶颈：变压器与GOES交付风险
evidence.title_en: AI电力硬件瓶颈：变压器与GOES交付风险
evidence.summary_zh: 配电变压器交期已从2019年的3-6个月拉长到2023年的12-30个月，DOE把GOES、铝、铜等材料短缺列为原因之一。 工业证据很强：变压器交期仍远高于正常采购周期，核心OEM的在手订单增长快于收入兑现，高等级取向硅钢（GOES）的认证与保供比表观钢材吨数更紧。 认证风险： 电网公司和电力设备OEM对变压器、铁芯、有载分接开关、套管、绝缘系统的认证周期很长。
evidence.summary_en: 配电变压器交期已从2019年的3-6个月拉长到2023年的12-30个月，DOE把GOES、铝、铜等材料短缺列为原因之一。 工业证据很强：变压器交期仍远高于正常采购周期，核心OEM的在手订单增长快于收入兑现，高等级取向硅钢（GOES）的认证与保供比表观钢材吨数更紧。 认证风险： 电网公司和电力设备OEM对变压器、铁芯、有载分接开关、套管、绝缘系统的认证周期很长。
evidence.implication_zh: 说明 AI 基础设施的约束首先体现在电力、电网和设备交付，而不是只体现在芯片供给。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that the first binding constraint is power, grid access, and equipment delivery, not only chip supply.

evidence.title_zh: 研究报告：变压器瓶颈的压力测试 —— 上游取向硅钢（GOES）与铜的物理约束
evidence.title_en: 研究报告：变压器瓶颈的压力测试 —— 上游取向硅钢（GOES）与铜的物理约束
evidence.summary_zh: 研究报告：变压器瓶颈的压力测试 —— 上游取向硅钢（GOES）与铜的物理约束。 尽管扩大变压器组装产能是 AI 基础设施竞赛的关键环节，但在 2026-2028 年窗口期内，部署的终极物理咽喉在于高等级取向硅钢（GOES）的极度缺乏弹性，以及全球铜供应链的结构性短缺。 向上游轮动： 投资者应将其 AI 基础设施组合的一部分从“组装导向型”工业股轮动至“提取与加工导向型”材料股（即 HGO 生产商和具备 2026-2027 年交付能力的…
evidence.summary_en: 研究报告：变压器瓶颈的压力测试 —— 上游取向硅钢（GOES）与铜的物理约束。 尽管扩大变压器组装产能是 AI 基础设施竞赛的关键环节，但在 2026-2028 年窗口期内，部署的终极物理咽喉在于高等级取向硅钢（GOES）的极度缺乏弹性，以及全球铜供应链的结构性短缺。 向上游轮动： 投资者应将其 AI 基础设施组合的一部分从“组装导向型”工业股轮动至“提取与加工导向型”材料股（即 HGO 生产商和具备 2026-2027 年交付能力的…
evidence.implication_zh: 说明 AI 基础设施的约束首先体现在电力、电网和设备交付，而不是只体现在芯片供给。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that the first binding constraint is power, grid access, and equipment delivery, not only chip supply.

evidence.title_zh: 电力设备价格联动机制与监管政策：铜铝冲击究竟有多少传导到利润？
evidence.title_en: 电力设备价格联动机制与监管政策：铜铝冲击究竟有多少传导到利润？
evidence.summary_zh: 研究记录 05（materials-analyst）的结论是：铜同比 +42.1%、铝 +46.5% 是真实的成本冲击，但 不足以 击穿 2026 Q3 之前电力设备的业绩可见度，因为 (i) 国家电网订单与特高压在手 + 12–24 个月交付时滞已锁定收入；(ii) 部分细分有价格调整传导；(iii) 主设备厂（东方/上海/哈电 + 特高压主力）通过产品结构升级稳定毛利率。 电力设备价格联动机制与监管政策：铜铝冲击究竟有多少传导到利…

evidence.implication_en: Shows that the first binding constraint is power, grid access, and equipment delivery, not only chip supply.

evidence.title_zh: 电工钢 (GOES) 与铜：电力设备瓶颈的上游压力测试
evidence.title_en: 电工钢 (GOES) 与铜：电力设备瓶颈的上游压力测试
evidence.summary_zh: 电工钢 (GOES) 与铜：电力设备瓶颈的上游压力测试。 本报告从材料侧做压力测试，结论是： GOES 与精炼铜的供需缺口在 2026–2028 年仍足以为 OEM 提供定价支撑，但 2028–2030 年的「定价权可持续性」并非一边倒 ——GOES 端的真实瓶颈是高磁感薄规格 (HiB / domain-refined) 与硅钢片冲剪产能，而不是粗钢；铜端的真实瓶颈在精炼与电网级线材，而非矿端。 需求侧：变压器用 GOES 在 AI…
evidence.summary_en: 电工钢 (GOES) 与铜：电力设备瓶颈的上游压力测试。 本报告从材料侧做压力测试，结论是： GOES 与精炼铜的供需缺口在 2026–2028 年仍足以为 OEM 提供定价支撑，但 2028–2030 年的「定价权可持续性」并非一边倒 ——GOES 端的真实瓶颈是高磁感薄规格 (HiB / domain-refined) 与硅钢片冲剪产能，而不是粗钢；铜端的真实瓶颈在精炼与电网级线材，而非矿端。 需求侧：变压器用 GOES 在 AI…
evidence.implication_zh: 说明 AI 基础设施的约束首先体现在电力、电网和设备交付，而不是只体现在芯片供给。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that the first binding constraint is power, grid access, and equipment delivery, not only chip supply.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 变压器与液冷供应链对 AI 基础设施的约束
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 工作日期：2026-05-23。本报告对前序“AI capex 正在遭遇物理部署约束”的判断作压力测试，并给出更窄的结论：变压器、变电站设备及相关电网硬件，很可能是继电力可得性之后的第二个硬物理约束...
risk_matrix.summary_en: Flags power and grid execution risk that can delay capacity, pressure margins, or raise discount rates.

risk_matrix.summary_en: Flags power and grid execution risk that can delay capacity, pressure margins, or raise discount rates.

risk_matrix.summary_en: Flags industrial supply bottlenecks execution risk that can delay capacity, pressure margins, or raise discount rates.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 研究报告：2026-05-17 - 变压器供应瓶颈与GOES利润捕获

risk_matrix.summary_en: Flags industrial supply bottlenecks execution risk that can delay capacity, pressure margins, or raise discount rates.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 电网基础设施扩容节奏 vs AI 算力资本开支切换
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 研究记录 立场: 支持 (support) - 分析师:公用事业分析师 工作日期: 2026-05-19 (亚洲/新加坡) - 主题:AI 驱动的电网扩容——变压器、特高压、开关设备瓶颈评估 - 问题:配电侧设备(变压器、开关...
risk_matrix.summary_en: The research stress-tests whether AI compute growth is constrained by grid expansion, transformers, and distribution infrastructure rather than only by semiconductor availability.

risk_matrix.title_zh: AIDC 交付悖论：国产变压器速度 vs 局部电网消纳
risk_matrix.title_en: AIDC delivery paradox: transformer speed versus local grid absorption
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 说明国产变压器交付速度不能自动转化为可用算力，关键仍是并网、电力质量、调度规则和本地电网消纳。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Shows that faster transformer delivery does not automatically become usable compute; interconnection, power quality, dispatch rules, and local grid absorption remain binding constraints.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 变压器及电力设备产业链：全球产能弹性、毛利率水平与出海竞争格局
risk_matrix.title_en: Nonferrous-metal stress test for power-equipment gross margins
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 压力测试铜、铝等有色金属价格是否足以压缩电力设备毛利率和业绩确定性。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Tests whether copper and aluminum price pressure can compress power-equipment margins and earnings visibility.

risk_matrix.title_zh: AI数据中心电力侧供应瓶颈与电网并网进度评估
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 分析师： 公用事业分析师 - 立场： 支持（验证前序研究"time-to-power 而非 capex 美元是约束"的核心判断） - 工作日期（亚洲/新加坡）： 2026-05-18
risk_matrix.summary_en: Flags AI infrastructure execution risk that can delay capacity, pressure margins, or raise discount rates.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 产业链调研：电力设备产业链：变压器及配电网核心组件的产能与交期评估

risk_matrix.summary_zh: 核查变压器和配电网核心组件的产能、交期与订单兑现度。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Checks transformer and distribution-grid component capacity, lead times, and order convertibility.

risk_matrix.summary_en: Flags industrial supply bottlenecks execution risk that can delay capacity, pressure margins, or raise discount rates.

risk_matrix.title_zh: AI电力硬件瓶颈：变压器与GOES交付风险
risk_matrix.title_en: AI power-hardware bottlenecks: transformer and GOES delivery risk
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 跟踪变压器与 GOES 交付风险，作为 AI 电力硬件部署的关键约束。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Tracks transformer and GOES delivery risk as a key constraint on AI power-hardware deployment.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 智算中心扩张下的能源供给压力与新型电力系统建设
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 作者：能源行业分析师 - 日期 (Asia/Singapore)：2026-05-22 - 研究记录 — 立场： support（支持） - 议题主线：量子纠错与 AI 算力范式转移 - 本报告问题：随着国产 GPU 在推理市场规模化，如...
risk_matrix.summary_en: Flags AI infrastructure execution risk that can delay capacity, pressure margins, or raise discount rates.

rows.主要变量: AI 数据中心、电网扩容、海外替换需求
rows.财务传导: 订单增长、预付款、排产锁定
rows.投资含义: 需求真实但可能被政策与交付截流

rows.主要变量: 关税、反规避、补贴资格、采购限制、安全审查
rows.财务传导: 额外合规成本、客户资格排除、订单转移
rows.投资含义: 决定出口额能否转化为高毛利

rows.主要变量: 本地化产能、认证、并网、运输、项目验收
rows.财务传导: 收入确认延期、现金流错配、库存占用
rows.投资含义: 决定订单到利润表的时间差

rows.财务传导: 毛利率压力或价格重估
rows.投资含义: 决定设备链利润池如何分配

rows.主要变量: 资本成本、拥挤交易、利用率、客户 capex
rows.财务传导: 估值折现率和业绩兑现概率变化
rows.投资含义: 决定主题行情能否升级为盈利行情

rows.Main variables: AI data centers, grid expansion, overseas replacement demand
rows.Investment implication: Demand can be real while policy and delivery filters intercept profit

rows.Main variables: Tariffs, anti-circumvention, subsidy eligibility, procurement limits, security reviews
rows.Financial transmission: Compliance cost, customer exclusion, order migration
rows.Investment implication: Determines whether exports become high-margin revenue

rows.Main variables: Localized capacity, certification, interconnection, logistics, project acceptance
rows.Financial transmission: Delayed revenue recognition, cash-flow mismatch, inventory drag
rows.Investment implication: Determines the gap between order intake and the income statement

rows.Main variables: Copper, aluminum, GOES, core components, FX
rows.Investment implication: Determines how the equipment-chain profit pool is allocated

rows.Main variables: Capital cost, crowded positioning, utilization, customer capex
rows.Investment implication: Determines whether the theme becomes an earnings cycle

rows.触发条件: 设备交期缩短、电价稳定、模型效率提升
rows.宏观/资产含义: AI 基础设施利润率扩张，通胀担忧回落
rows.投资动作: 做多高质量设备与效率受益者，降低纯故事久期暴露

rows.触发条件: 变压器/GOES/并网约束持续，PPA 与资本成本上行
rows.宏观/资产含义: 资本开支兑现慢于估值，通胀黏性上升
rows.投资动作: 偏向现金流确定的设备链，控制数据中心拥挤交易

rows.触发条件: 云端受限推动边缘 AI、ASIC 和自动化替代
rows.宏观/资产含义: 硬件需求迁移，软件效率成为通胀缓冲
rows.投资动作: 配置架构替代和效率工具，谨慎追逐长久期主题

rows.Trigger: Shorter equipment lead times, stable power prices, higher model efficiency
rows.Macro/asset implication: AI infrastructure margins expand and inflation concern fades
rows.Investor action: Favor quality equipment and efficiency beneficiaries; reduce pure-duration narrative exposure

rows.Trigger: Transformer/GOES/interconnection constraints persist; PPAs and capital costs rise
rows.Macro/asset implication: Capex monetization lags valuation; inflation stickiness rises
rows.Investor action: Prefer cash-flow-backed equipment exposure; control crowded data-center trades

rows.Trigger: Cloud constraints push edge AI, ASICs, and automation substitutes
rows.Macro/asset implication: Hardware demand migrates while software efficiency buffers inflation
rows.Investor action: Allocate to architecture substitution and efficiency tools; stay selective on long-duration themes

rows.投资暴露: 具备海外本地化交付、高端核心件、价格联动和认证能力的电力设备龙头
rows.配置逻辑: 订单向收入转化概率更高，材料和政策冲击更容易转嫁
rows.关键检查项: 交期、海外收入占比、分部毛利率、核心部件自供率

rows.投资暴露: 特高压/超高压、配网自动化、开关设备、冷却和电力电子配套
rows.配置逻辑: 受益于电网投资前置，但标的质量分化大
rows.关键检查项: 订单质量、客户结构、项目验收、库存周转

rows.投资暴露: 仅有概念叙事、缺少认证或本地交付、原材料敞口高且缺少价格联动的公司
rows.配置逻辑: 收入增长可能被关税、延期和毛利率压缩吞噬
rows.关键检查项: 毛利率下修、应收账款上升、延期交付公告

rows.投资暴露: 铜铝价格、汇率、海外政策风险、客户资本开支削减风险
rows.配置逻辑: 可用作设备链利润率和估值波动的对冲变量
rows.关键检查项: 大宗商品价格、关税公告、客户 capex 指引

rows.Exposure: Power-equipment leaders with localized delivery, high-end core components, price escalation, and certification
rows.Rationale: Higher probability that orders convert into revenue and that materials/policy shocks are passed through
rows.Key checks: Lead times, overseas revenue mix, segment margin, core-component self-supply

rows.Exposure: UHV/EHV, distribution automation, switchgear, cooling, and power electronics
rows.Rationale: Beneficiaries of grid pull-forward, but stock quality is dispersed
rows.Key checks: Order quality, customer mix, project acceptance, inventory turns

rows.Exposure: Narrative-only names lacking certification or local delivery, with high materials exposure and weak repricing clauses
rows.Rationale: Revenue growth can be absorbed by tariffs, delays, and gross-margin compression
rows.Key checks: Margin cuts, rising receivables, delivery-delay disclosures

rows.Exposure: Copper/aluminum, FX, overseas policy risk, customer capex cuts
rows.Rationale: Useful hedges for equipment-chain margin and valuation volatility
rows.Key checks: Commodity prices, tariff announcements, customer capex guidance

rows.指标: 变压器、开关设备、GOES 的季度交期
rows.如何解读: 交期继续延长支持瓶颈定价；交期缩短说明供给缓解
rows.证据来源: 设备商公告、渠道调研、招标文件

rows.指标: 美国/EU 关税、补贴资格、采购限制、反规避调查
rows.如何解读: 新增限制压缩高毛利市场通道；豁免或本地化认证扩大空间
rows.证据来源: 官方公告、客户采购规则、企业产能布局

rows.指标: 海外分部毛利率、价格联动条款、金属库存覆盖
rows.如何解读: 收入增长若不伴随毛利率稳定，说明利润池被成本吸收
rows.证据来源: 财报、订单合同、原材料价格

rows.指标: AIDC 并网队列、PPA 价格、局部消纳能力
rows.如何解读: 并网瓶颈持续会延后算力上线但强化电网设备需求
rows.证据来源: 公用事业数据、PPA 披露、项目开工信息

rows.指标: 主题拥挤度、资金流、久期资产利率敏感度
rows.如何解读: 拥挤交易在延迟兑现时更容易被折现率冲击
rows.证据来源: ETF/行业资金流、估值分位、信用利差

rows.Indicator: Quarterly lead times for transformers, switchgear, and GOES
rows.Interpretation: Longer lead times support bottleneck pricing; shorter lead times indicate supply relief
rows.Evidence source: Vendor disclosures, channel surveys, tender documents

rows.Indicator: US/EU tariffs, subsidy eligibility, procurement limits, anti-circumvention cases
rows.Interpretation: New limits compress high-margin channels; exemptions and localization widen the addressable market
rows.Evidence source: Official notices, customer procurement rules, capacity-location disclosures

rows.Indicator: Overseas segment margin, price-escalation clauses, metal inventory coverage
rows.Interpretation: Revenue growth without stable margins means the profit pool is absorbed by costs
rows.Evidence source: Financial reports, order contracts, commodity prices

rows.Indicator: AIDC interconnection queues, PPA prices, local absorption capacity
rows.Interpretation: Persistent interconnection bottlenecks delay compute launch while supporting grid-equipment demand
rows.Evidence source: Utility data, PPA disclosures, project start notices

rows.Indicator: Theme crowding, flows, rate sensitivity of duration assets
rows.Interpretation: Crowded trades are more vulnerable when earnings conversion is delayed
rows.Evidence source: ETF/sector flows, valuation percentiles, credit spreads

rows.主要变量: AI 数据中心、电网扩容、海外替换需求

rows.投资含义: 需求真实但可能被政策与交付截流

rows.证据来源: 公用事业数据、PPA 披露、项目开工信息

rows.指标: 主题拥挤度、资金流、久期资产利率敏感度
rows.如何解读: 拥挤交易在延迟兑现时更容易被折现率冲击
rows.证据来源: ETF/行业资金流、估值分位、信用利差

rows.Main variables: AI data centers, grid expansion, overseas replacement demand
rows.Investment implication: Demand can be real while policy and delivery filters intercept profit

rows.Main variables: Tariffs, anti-circumvention, subsidy eligibility, procurement limits, security reviews
rows.Financial transmission: Compliance cost, customer exclusion, order migration
rows.Investment implication: Determines whether exports become high-margin revenue

rows.Main variables: Localized capacity, certification, interconnection, logistics, project acceptance
rows.Financial transmission: Delayed revenue recognition, cash-flow mismatch, inventory drag
rows.Investment implication: Determines the gap between order intake and the income statement

rows.Main variables: Copper, aluminum, GOES, core components, FX
rows.Investment implication: Determines how the equipment-chain profit pool is allocated

rows.Main variables: Capital cost, crowded positioning, utilization, customer capex
rows.Investment implication: Determines whether the theme becomes an earnings cycle

rows.Trigger: Shorter equipment lead times, stable power prices, higher model efficiency
rows.Macro/asset implication: AI infrastructure margins expand and inflation concern fades
rows.Investor action: Favor quality equipment and efficiency beneficiaries; reduce pure-duration narrative exposure

rows.Trigger: Transformer/GOES/interconnection constraints persist; PPAs and capital costs rise
rows.Macro/asset implication: Capex monetization lags valuation; inflation stickiness rises
rows.Investor action: Prefer cash-flow-backed equipment exposure; control crowded data-center trades

rows.Trigger: Cloud constraints push edge AI, ASICs, and automation substitutes
rows.Macro/asset implication: Hardware demand migrates while software efficiency buffers inflation
rows.Investor action: Allocate to architecture substitution and efficiency tools; stay selective on long-duration themes

rows.Exposure: Power-equipment leaders with localized delivery, high-end core components, price escalation, and certification
rows.Rationale: Higher probability that orders convert into revenue and that materials/policy shocks are passed through
rows.Key checks: Lead times, overseas revenue mix, segment margin, core-component self-supply

rows.Exposure: UHV/EHV, distribution automation, switchgear, cooling, and power electronics
rows.Rationale: Beneficiaries of grid pull-forward, but stock quality is dispersed
rows.Key checks: Order quality, customer mix, project acceptance, inventory turns

rows.Exposure: Narrative-only names lacking certification or local delivery, with high materials exposure and weak repricing clauses
rows.Rationale: Revenue growth can be absorbed by tariffs, delays, and gross-margin compression
rows.Key checks: Margin cuts, rising receivables, delivery-delay disclosures

rows.Exposure: Copper/aluminum, FX, overseas policy risk, customer capex cuts
rows.Rationale: Useful hedges for equipment-chain margin and valuation volatility
rows.Key checks: Commodity prices, tariff announcements, customer capex guidance

rows.Indicator: Quarterly lead times for transformers, switchgear, and GOES
rows.Interpretation: Longer lead times support bottleneck pricing; shorter lead times indicate supply relief
rows.Evidence source: Vendor disclosures, channel surveys, tender documents

rows.Indicator: US/EU tariffs, subsidy eligibility, procurement limits, anti-circumvention cases
rows.Interpretation: New limits compress high-margin channels; exemptions and localization widen the addressable market
rows.Evidence source: Official notices, customer procurement rules, capacity-location disclosures

rows.Indicator: Overseas segment margin, price-escalation clauses, metal inventory coverage
rows.Interpretation: Revenue growth without stable margins means the profit pool is absorbed by costs
rows.Evidence source: Financial reports, order contracts, commodity prices

rows.Indicator: AIDC interconnection queues, PPA prices, local absorption capacity
rows.Interpretation: Persistent interconnection bottlenecks delay compute launch while supporting grid-equipment demand
rows.Evidence source: Utility data, PPA disclosures, project start notices

rows.Indicator: Theme crowding, flows, rate sensitivity of duration assets
rows.Interpretation: Crowded trades are more vulnerable when earnings conversion is delayed
rows.Evidence source: ETF/sector flows, valuation percentiles, credit spreads
